title: GitHub Pull Request
description: A GitHub pull request representing a proposed change to a repository, including metadata for code review, merging, and CI/CD status.

id.description: The unique identifier of the pull request.

node_id.description: The GraphQL node ID for the pull request.

url.description: The API URL for the pull request.

html_url.description: The URL of the pull request on GitHub.

diff_url.description: The URL to the pull request diff.

patch_url.description: The URL to the pull request patch.

number.description: The pull request number within the repository.

state.description: The current state of the pull request.

locked.description: Whether the pull request is locked.

title.description: The title of the pull request.

body.description: The contents of the pull request description in Markdown format.

labels.description: Labels applied to the pull request.

assignees.description: Users assigned to the pull request.

requested_reviewers.description: Users requested to review the pull request.

requested_teams.description: Teams requested to review the pull request.

draft.description: Whether the pull request is a draft.

merged.description: Whether the pull request has been merged.

mergeable.description: Whether the pull request can be merged. Null if not yet computed.

mergeable_state.description: The mergeability state of the pull request.

merge_commit_sha.description: The SHA of the merge commit, if merged.

merged_by.description: The user who merged the pull request.

comments.description: The number of comments on the pull request.

review_comments.description: The number of review comments on the pull request.

commits.description: The number of commits in the pull request.

created_at.description: The date and time the pull request was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the pull request was last updated.

closed_at.description: The date and time the pull request was closed.

merged_at.description: The date and time the pull request was merged.

commit_title.description: The commit title for the auto-merge.

commit_message.description: The commit message for the auto-merge.

author_association.description: How the author is associated with the repository.

SimpleUser.description: A simplified representation of a GitHub user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

html_url.description: URL to the user's GitHub profile.

Label.description: A label applied to an issue or pull request.

id.description: The unique identifier of the label.

color.description: The hex color code of the label.

Team.description: A GitHub team within an organization.

id.description: The unique identifier of the team.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug of the team name.

privacy.description: The privacy level of the team.

permission.description: The default permission level for repositories.

BranchRef.description: A reference to a branch in a repository.

label.description: The label for the branch in owner:branch format.

sha.description: The SHA of the head commit on the branch.

repo.description: The repository the branch belongs to.
